transitionFromCompleted: Cooperative approach {} is Completed — its lifecycle has ended and its status cannot change. To start a new bilateral arrangement, create a fresh cooperative approach.
transitionFromRevoked: Cooperative approach {} was Revoked under Draft -/CMA.5 paras 20-21. Revoked is terminal; no further status changes are permitted.
transitionRevertToDraft: Cooperative approach {} cannot revert from {} to Draft. Once a CA leaves Draft, its working version is fixed.
